_comment: Cross-stack interop fixtures, generated from the TS reference with a fixed ed25519 key. A verifier MUST reproduce disclosures[].expect.decision and handshakes[].expect; SHOULD reproduce disclosures[].expect.failed. A full implementation also reproduces redactions[].expect (verifyRedacted), revocations[].expect (verifyRevocation), transparency[].expect (verifyInclusionProof).
